name: clickhouse
description: ClickHouse expertise with 28 atomic review rules + 14 deep reference files. Rules synced with official ClickHouse/agent-skills repository. Schema design, query optimization, insert strategy, cluster management, backups, monitoring, and security best practices.

skills.name: clickhouse-best-practices
skills.description: MUST USE when reviewing ClickHouse schemas, queries, or configurations. Contains 28 rules that MUST be checked before providing recommendations. Always read relevant rule files and cite specific rules in responses.
